description: Configure the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) module metadata for a new 'Landscaping Design Service' in the GardenWorld client. Create four active records: a Request Type named 'Design Consultation', a Request Category named 'Plant Selection' with the description 'Assistance with choosing plants for specific climates', a Request Group named 'Design Team', and a Request Resolution named 'Proposal Accepted' with the description 'Customer accepted the design proposal'.
